emails.subject: RE: Revised Pooling Point GTC
emails.body: RE: Revised Pooling Point GTC Thanks. Do you anticipate any more changes to this version?

emails.subject: RE: Revised Pooling Point GTC
emails.body: Not anytime soon, but within the next couple of weeks.

emails.subject: RE: Revised Pooling Point GTC
emails.body: In a nutshell, what changed on this version? I haven't compared it against the old one yet.

emails.subject: RE: Revised Pooling Point GTC
emails.body: The only change is in Section 2. I refer to the requirement to schedule the Daily Contract Quantity instead the Nomination.

emails.subject: RE: Revised Pooling Point GTC
emails.body: Thanks. I'm sure it would've taken me a while to figure out what the difference was.
